Connect any data source. Analyze it anywhere. Get insights with AI.

Automatically pull data from 350+ business platforms and send it to your BI tools, spreadsheets, warehouses, and AI chats with the Windsor.ai connectors.

Forget CSVs. Stop copy/paste. Sync data in 1 minute. No code required.

Start for FreeSign up with Google
Free forever planNo credit card needed
10,000+ companies choose Windsor.ai as their go-to data integration platform

Send your data wherever you need it — from $19/month

NEW: Windsor MCP for AI Insights

Ask AI anything about your data — directly in Claude & ChatGPT, and other LLMs

Connect your Windsor.ai data to your favorite AI tool and get answers in seconds, from cross-channel campaign analysis to performance dashboards.Learn more.

Install with one click:

Native connector for Claude
Native app for ChatGPT

Also works with:

other LLMs

Centralize your data and make it ready for AI-powered analytics, dashboards, and reports. Always fresh, unified, and accessible to your team and clients

  • Connect data
  • Export data
  • Automate pipelines
  • Schedule refreshes
  • Ask AI about your data

Build AI integrations and end-to-end ETL/ELT pipelines in minutes with no coding skills

Automate reporting and reduce manual data prep tasks to save 4+ hours every day

Get started and explore the platform’s features with a free plan

Start instantly with a vast library of free, customizable dashboard templates

Get started with Windsor.ai connectors in under 60 seconds

1

Sign up and start for free

Create your windsor.ai account and explore the platform’s capabilities at no cost.

2

Connect all your data sources

Aggregate data from more than 350+ sources with our secure and reliable ELT connectors.

3

Choose where to send your data

Transfer your unified data to the preferred destination: AI chat, BI tool, database, warehouse, or spreadsheet.

4

Bonus: Analyze your data faster with AI

Connect your data to ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI chats to unlock deeper insights and create visual summaries in seconds.

What clients say about Windsor.ai

Over 300,000 data professionals worldwide trust Windsor.ai, and their testimonials highlight our platform’s effectiveness and reliability.

See all reviews

Reviews & awards

  • Great customer support
  • Powerful integrations
  • Vast connector library
  • Ease of use
  • Affordable pricing
Roberto Fernandes6 month ago

Efficient tool. Fast support.

Windsor.ai is now a crucial tool in our day-to-day operations. We integrate data from various media channels with BigQuery quickly and transparently and have never had any type of instability. Every time we needed support, they were quick and resolved all cases.

Kelly Hatherell2 week ago

The backbone of cross-channel reporting.

Windsor.ai is easy to use and delivers all the data I need for full funnel marketing. I have been using this tool for close on 2 years and their product development is good.

Andreas Waldmann6 month ago

Found hidden ROI, saved $2.8M.

Windsor.ai transformed how we understand marketing performance. Multi-touch attribution showed us that channels we thought weren’t working were actually driving our most valuable customers. This insight alone saved us $2.8M annually and helped us scale our loan business more efficiently than ever.

Maxime Morell2 week ago

Excellent tool for Amazon data integration.

Windsor has been a game-changer for our data analysis. We’ve been using it for several months to extract sales data from our Amazon account, and it seamlessly integrates with Looker Studio to create accurate and detailed dashboards. The setup was straightforward, and the data is reliable. It has saved us a significant amount of time and effort in manually compiling reports.

See all reviews

A modern data platform for AI analytics and automated data workflows

  • Analysts
  • Agencies
  • Data teams

Windsor.ai for analysts

  • Automate data collection and reporting across 350+ channels
  • Build pipelines and prepare datasets without custom API scripts or manual exports
  • Use pre-built dashboard templates for instant reporting
  • Reduce dependency on engineering for new integrations
  • Identify trends and unlock deep insights in seconds with AI

⏱ Save up to 40 hours per week on manual data wrangling and prep

Try It Now

Windsor.ai for agencies

  • Automate cross-platform client dashboards and reporting
  • Manage reporting on hundreds of accounts from a single workspace
  • Get access to unlimited users and data blending on every plan
  • Scale to more sources, accounts, and clients without added maintenance
  • Onboard new clients in minutes instead of days

📈 Scale to 3x more clients without adding technical headcount

Try It Now

Windsor.ai for data teams

  • Replace fragile scripts with fully managed, automated pipelines
  • Normalize and transform datasets at scale with no manual effort
  • Send analysis-ready data to warehouses, BI tools, and LLMs via no-code connectors
  • Keep dashboards and models up to date with scheduled auto-refreshes

🧑‍💻 Eliminate over 80% of custom scripts and manual maintenance

Try It Now

Windsor.ai for data teams

  • Replace fragile scripts with fully managed, automated pipelines
  • Normalize and transform datasets at scale with no manual effort
  • Send analysis-ready data to warehouses, BI tools, and LLMs via no-code connectors
  • Keep dashboards and models up to date with scheduled auto-refreshes

🧑‍💻 Eliminate over 80% of custom scripts and manual maintenance

Try It Now

Turn raw data into insights: quick, AI-driven, fully automated

Connect, unify, and analyze all your data in one place.

Windsor.ai automates cross-platform data integration with a no-code ETL/ELT platform that handles schema mapping, updates, and near real-time syncs.

Gain a single source of truth for all your marketing and business performance and connect your data to AI chats for deeper insights, saving weekly

40+ hrs

Bring all your data together

Easily blend data from multiple sources and make it available where your team needs it, be it Looker Studio, Claude, BigQuery, Power BI, Sheets, or another destination.

Automate data workflows

Streamline recurring tasks and eliminate manual data wrangling by replacing scripts, file exports, and spreadsheet copy-pasting with fully automated data movement.

Optimize strategy and budget

Get a unified view of performance across all channels, spot top campaigns and underperforming spend, and reallocate budget based on real data, not guesswork.

Turn your data into a strategic asset. Get instant insights across all your platforms with Windsor.ai

One connection, endless possibilities. Centralize your data and instantly fuel your AI assistants, BI dashboards, and custom reports.
